title: Monday Doc - Row Size Issue
excerpt: The tables in all of my workdoc are no longer automatically adjusting their row height to accommodate the content, causing the text to overflow. This issue has persisted for several days. What is causing this problem? Is…

posts.author: alessandrobam (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml: The tables in all of my workdoc are no longer automatically adjusting their row height to accommodate the content, causing the text to overflow. This issue has persisted for several days. What is causing this problem? Is anyone facing this?

posts.author: sirah (Sirah E)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @alessandrobam Sirah here from Mindflows!

Does this occur with all items or just one specific item? Have you tried troubleshooting by deleting the column and adding it again? Also, if the problems persist I recommend contacting support as this could be a technical issue.

I hope this helps!

posts.author: alessandrobam (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml: It happens for all of my docs and even on newly created tables in new docs. How do I contact the support? The bot is not helping me.

posts.author: sirah (Sirah E)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @alessandrobam you can check here: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us
